'''Cristina da Silva''' is a Brazilian actress and model. She played the [[Handmaiden/Legends|handmaiden]] [[Rabé/Legends|Rabé]] in [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].

She also appeared in the British short movie ''Dead on Time'' directed by [[Wikipedia:James Larkin (actor)|James Larkin]].
